error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred in the application.

workbench.title: Workbench
workbench.description: Configure tab behavior and workspace preferences.

restoreTabs.label: Restore tabs on startup
restoreTabs.description: Re-open tabs from the previous session when the app starts.

closeLastTab.label: Allow closing the last tab
closeLastTab.description: When disabled, the last tab cannot be closed.

maxTabs.label: Maximum open tabs
maxTabs.description: Oldest tabs are closed automatically when the limit is reached.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the visual look of the application.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Light, dark or follow the system.

menubar.label: Menu bar
menubar.description: Show or hide the menu in the titlebar.

tabbar.label: Tab bar
tabbar.description: Show or hide the tab bar in the titlebar.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Adjust font and icon sizes across the interface.

fontSize.label: Font size
fontSize.description: Controls the base text size for the entire application.

sidebarIconSize.label: Sidebar icons
sidebarIconSize.description: Size of the icons in the navigation sidebar.

tabbarIconSize.label: Tab bar icons
tabbarIconSize.description: Size of the icons shown in the open tab bar.
